title: Fermented Ethiopian Fines-Herbes Stew
description: A flavorful and light stew featuring the finest herbs, balanced with Ethiopian spices and fermented to perfection. Serve with injera bread or over rice.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped fines-herbes and cook until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Add the curry powder, cumin, salt, black pepper, turmeric, and red pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tempeh, mitmita, ginger, and chocolate, and cook until the chocolate has melted.
Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and let it cool to room temperature.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let it ferment at room temperature for 2 days.
After the fermentation process, transfer the stew to a Dutch oven or oven-safe pot and simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional fines-herbes if desired.
